personal.name: Michiel Peeraer
personal.title: Full-Stack TypeScript Developer
personal.about: Full-stack TypeScript developer with expertise in MERN / PERN stacks and Python, skilled in creating scalable, production-ready web applications. Proficient in frontend architecture, REST API integration, and backend services. Committed to performance optimization and clean software architecture, delivering tangible business value through software solutions. Seeking opportunities across the EU.
